headline: Coatue and NFX Alums Launch Catalyst by Outcast Ventures, Redefining How Companies Get Founded
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 17, 2026--Today, Andy Chen and Amy Lin, Coatue and NFX alums, respectively, announced Catalyst by Outcast Ventures.

headline: Whimstay Launches Travel Agent Program, Opening New Earning Opportunities for Travel Professionals
summary: Whimstay today announced the launch of its Travel Agent Program, a new platform designed to help travel professionals earn commission on vacation rental bookings across hundreds of thousands of professionally managed properties throughout North America, Mexico, the Caribbean, and Europe.

raw.headline: Whimstay Launches Travel Agent Program, Opening New Earning Opportunities for Travel Professionals
raw.summary: Whimstay today announced the launch of its Travel Agent Program, a new platform designed to help travel professionals earn commission on vacation rental bookings across hundreds of thousands of professionally managed properties throughout North America, Mexico, the Caribbean, and Europe.

headline: 'Significant, but not catastrophic': A fall in Chinese visitors barely dents tourism numbers to Japan
summary: Experts stress that Japan’s tourism portfolio is now more diversified and resilient, with Western markets also contributing strongly.

raw.headline: 'Significant, but not catastrophic': A fall in Chinese visitors barely dents tourism numbers to Japan
raw.summary: Experts stress that Japan’s tourism portfolio is now more diversified and resilient, with Western markets also contributing strongly.
